creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 157027
patch to upgrade sysutils/slurm-hpc to version 14.11.7 and change name to slurm-wlm

From Danny Auble of SchedMD: "we are trying to standardize on slurm-wlm for the package name with the different distros. How difficult would it be to change the name?"
